title: [supervisor] Triage current PR pile and clear green/stale/superseded work
objective: Run the immediate PR-pile triage intended by `.handoff/.idea`: prioritize runner-smoke/meta CI, meta/envctl infrastructure, repeated Linux integration failures, Dependabot/release PRs, and old stale PRs; rerun stale queued checks once, update behind green candidates, merge/automerge green PRs, and close/rebase/regenerate superseded PRs with evidence.
acceptance_criteria: A fresh FlexNetOS open-PR scan is captured with repository, number, title, head/base, merge state, required/advisory checks, and last run ids.
Every green_candidate is either merged/automerge armed, updated if behind, or documented with a blocker.
Every stale_queued item is rerun once before any repair worker is assigned.
Every superseded or old stale PR is closed/rebased/regenerated or documented with exact reason it remains open.
The triage result is committed under `.handoff/pr-repair/scans` or `.handoff/pr-repair/queue.jsonl` and lessons/signatures are stored when reusable.

source_gap_audit.reason: Expanded from .handoff/.idea intent after the initial TASK-PRR set proved too broad.
